analysis.name: Based
analysis.summary: BASED是Hyperliquid上的金融超级应用，支持交易加密货币、股票和大宗商品，并提供Visa卡消费。24小时涨幅11%，但7日仍跌14%，市值约1938万美元。上涨可能受Hyperliquid生态热度及产品更新催化，但流通量仅2.35亿，总供应10亿，解锁压力大。建议观望。

recommendation.invalidation: 价格跌破0.07美元或成交量萎缩

catalysts: Hyperliquid生态热度持续，BASED作为其上的超级应用可能受益
产品功能更新（如Visa卡、AI钱包）可能吸引用户
Binance Alpha Spotlight等平台关注可能带来曝光

latestNews.title: Based Price Today | BASED to USD Live Price, Market Cap & Chart - Binance
latestNews.reason: 仅为价格跟踪页面，无实质信息

latestNews.title: Brett (BASED) Price Prediction 2026–2030: Can the Meme Coin Reach $1?
latestNews.reason: 第三方预测，非官方消息，且BASED并非Meme币

fundamentals: 基于Hyperliquid构建的金融超级应用，支持多资产交易
提供Visa白金卡，可直接消费加密资产
总供应量10亿，流通量2.35亿，流通率23.5%
市值约1938万美元，FDV约8249万美元
marketRead: 24小时涨幅11.48%，但7日跌幅14.24%，短期反弹但中期仍弱
成交量约2476万美元，相对市值（1938万）较高，换手率约128%，说明交易活跃
价格距历史高点0.308美元跌73%，上方套牢盘重
risks: 总供应10亿，流通仅2.35亿，未来解锁压力巨大
项目处于早期，产品采用率未知
Hyperliquid生态竞争激烈，BASED可能被替代
价格波动大，24小时涨11%但7日跌14%，趋势不明
sourceNotes: 数据来自CoinGecko和DexScreener，新闻多为聚合页面，缺乏直接利好
项目描述来自CoinGecko，未验证真实性

profile.name: Based
profile.description: Based is a financial superapp built on Hyperliquid that lets users trade crypto, equities, and commodities from a single interface, fund accounts directly from bank accounts or credit cards, and spend balances at over 100 million merchants worldwide using a Visa Platinum card that converts at the point of sale with no separate off-ramp required. The platform operates across web, iOS, Android, and desktop with one account, and includes features like curated Launchpools for early project access and AI-native wallets for autonomous trading and risk monitoring.
